name: function 6
function 10
func:
msg.topic = "Select * from thresholds ORDER BY `id` DESC LIMIT 1"

return msg;

name: function 11
function 12
func:
msg.topic = `
SELECT
    (SELECT bat FROM data ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_bat,
    (SELECT minBat FROM thresholds ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_minBat,

    (SELECT temp FROM data ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_temp,
    (SELECT maxTemp FROM thresholds ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_maxTemp,

    (SELECT hum FROM data ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_hum,
    (SELECT minHum FROM thresholds ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_minHum,

    (SELECT co2 FROM data ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_co2,
    (SELECT maxCO2 FROM thresholds ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_maxCO2
`;
return msg;
